Class GenericConnectorTestResult

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.connector.instrument.generic.GenericConnectorTestResult
public class GenericConnectorTestResult extends Object
Result DTO for a generic connector endpoint test. Contains the HTTP request URL (with API key masked), HTTP status code, raw response snippet, parsed data rows, execution time, and any error message. Returned by the test endpoint to help users verify their connector configuration.
